sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49641" key="qwu=ma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θωῦμα</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θωυμάζω</orth>, etc., less correct forms for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θῶμα, θωμάζω</foreign>, <sense id="n49641.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">θαυμ-</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
